stories.headline: Xbox layoffs: What's next for the video game giant?
stories.description: The video game giant owned by Microsoft plans to let 3,200 workers go. Will it be a big reset or a system crash?

stories.headline: Travellers warned of methanol poisoning risks in new campaign
stories.description: Holidaymakers are urged to understand the dangers and symptoms of methanol poisoning.

stories.headline: FIFA World Cup brackets: Teams, predictions, schedule and road to the final
stories.description: Spain booked its place in the World Cup final while England and Argentina prepare for the game at Atlanta stadium.

stories.headline: ‘A role model’: Djed Spence, first Muslim England player, lifts hopes
stories.description: Britain swells with pride over the 25-year-old, the first Muslim to wear the England jersey at a FIFA World Cup.

stories.headline: Bangkok pub fire toll rises to 32 with 15 in intensive care
stories.description: Officials confirm two more deaths as 30 people remain in hospital, including 15 in intensive care units.
